input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.9.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.9.1.3
            TITLE: cones are placed along the course edges at intervals, approximately 6 m

            CONTENT:
            rule D.9.1.3: Cones are placed along the course edges at intervals, approximately 6 m
D.9.1.3 Cones are placed along the course edges at intervals, approximately 6 m

final_answer: Cones are placed along the course edges at intervals, approximately 6 m
